title: aphloia mauritiana var. theiformis
intro: Aphloia mauritiana var. theiformis, also known as Theiformis, is a variety of the Aphloia tree, a type of flowering plant native to Madagascar. The leaves and roots of Theiformis are used in traditional medicine and possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Theiformis include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a digestive aid. The herbal preparations of Theiformis include infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which can be used to create teas, tinctures, and capsules for medicinal purposes.
